user.title: Hass Records
user.description: Record custom events and annotate your history and statistics charts.

record.name: Record Event
record.description: Record a custom event with an optional chart annotation.

annotation.name: Annotation
annotation.description: Detailed tooltip text for chart markers.

entity_ids.name: Entities
entity_ids.description: Entities to associate this event with. Leave empty for a global event visible on all charts.
